## ERT1.2. En route capacity incentive scheme {#ert1.2.-en-route-capacity-incentive-scheme .Heading-2-ER}

The Cypriot NSA reports a financial bonus for the ANSP of €443 412 for en route capacity performance in 2025. A local incentive target was set at 0.17 min/flight, for all causes of delay, and an actual value of 0.03 mins/flight was achieved.
